title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KILING, MUNICIPALITY OF TANAUAN, PROVINCEOF LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE KILING HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 33756 / 88 OG No. 22, 3268 (June 1, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7379, April 10, 1992 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KILING, MUNICIPALITY OF TANAUAN, PROVINCEOF LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE KILING HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a high school inBarangay Kiling, Municipality of Tanauan, Province of Leyte, to be known as the Kiling High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education, Culture and Sports shall issue the rules and regulations necessary to implement this Act.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary for the implementation of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 29,1992 and January 27, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. DABOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APR 10, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
